clips.ko_desc: 첫 만남에서 잘 보이려 긴장한 남자 — 어색한 미소가 굳는 순간 (후킹: 공감 찌르기)
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a nervous Korean man on a first date forcing a smile that stiffens, subtle tension in his eyes, the woman across slightly pulling back, slow push-in, warm light, shallow depth of field, 6s, 16:9

clips.ko_desc: 대비 컷 — 편안하게 기대 앉아 여유로운 미소를 짓는 남자
clips.prompt: Cinematic slow dolly-in on a calm Korean man leaning back relaxed on a date with a natural confident smile, the woman leaning in interested, warm golden light, shallow depth of field, 6s, 16:9

clips.ko_desc: 침묵에도 평온하게 커피를 한 모금 — '여유' 비주얼 후킹
clips.prompt: Close-up of a composed Korean man slowly sipping coffee during a quiet pause on a date, serene unbothered expression, subtle slow motion, warm light, shallow depth of field, 6s, 16:9

clips.ko_desc: 서로 동등하게 편안히 대화하며 미소 짓는 두 사람 (인트로 마무리, 희망적 톤)
clips.prompt: A Korean man and woman talking comfortably as equals at a cozy cafe, both relaxed and smiling, gentle ambient motion of steam rising from coffee, slow cinematic camera drift, warm tone, 6s, 16:9

_note: from_image_id 가 있으면 해당 이미지로 image-to-video, 없으면 text-to-video 로 생성. 파이프라인의 --videos 옵션이 자동 처리.
